## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm web:typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm web:build` succeeds (if touching `apps/web`)
- [ ] Code follows project style (Prettier)
